ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Roasted Glutinous Rice 43%, Salt 18%, Chilli Powder 11%, Sugar 8%, Flavour Enhancer (Monosodium Glutamate, Disodium 5'-ribonucleotide) 8%, Spices (Garlic, Coriander, Lemongrass) 5%, Fish Sauce Powder 3.5%, Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid) 3%, Natural Lime Flavour 0.5%
